$description: shadcn/ui flavor — a full DTCG override of the webtheme platform default capturing shadcn's default (zinc) token roles in oklch. Overrides only the roles shadcn names; every other family inherits the platform default via `extends`. Values transcribe shadcn/ui's default light theme (globals.css :root) — see the paired gap list report for what these roles CAN and CANNOT reach in a rendered FUI component.

color.$description: shadcn's core color roles. shadcn ships flat semantic roles (--background, --primary, --border …), not a numeric scale; each is transcribed here onto the closest platform-default color role. The `*-foreground` pairings shadcn ships for every surface have no platform-default home — recorded in the gap list.

accent.$description: shadcn --primary (zinc-900) — the near-black primary that distinguishes shadcn from a blue-accent default.

radius.$description: shadcn keys every radius off a single `--radius: 0.625rem`; `--radius-md`/`--radius-lg`/`--radius-sm` are calc()-derived from it.

ring.$description: shadcn's focus ring. shadcn draws a 3px ring at --ring with a --ring-offset; the platform-default `ring` role (#1316) is the closest home.

surface.$description: shadcn's neutral surface roles (--border / --input / --muted / --muted-foreground) — the #1317 platform roles that were named for shadcn parity in the first place.
